description: Click on an element by CSS selector or pixel coordinates. Returns: 'clicked at ({x}, {y})'. Example: {"selector": "#submit-btn"} or {"x": 100, "y": 200}
name: web_click

selector.description: CSS selector of element to click

browser_id.description: Browser instance ID (returned by web_start). If not specified and only one instance exists, that instance is used.
